1	name: Build and Run Tests by Maven
2	on:
3	  pull_request:
4	    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]
5	  push:
6	    branches: [master, develop, bazel]
7	
8	jobs:
9	  java_build:
10	    name: "maven-compile (${{ matrix.os }}, JDK-${{ matrix.jdk }})"
11	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
12	    strategy:
13	      fail-fast: false
14	      matrix:
15	        # see https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners#supported-runners-and-hardware-resources
16	        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest]
17	        jdk: [8]
18	    steps:
19	      - name: Checkout
20	        uses: actions/checkout@v2
21	      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
22	        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
23	        with:
24	          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
25	          # See https://github.com/actions/setup-java?tab=readme-ov-file#supported-distributions
26	          # AdoptOpenJDK got moved to Eclipse Temurin and won't be updated anymore.
27	          distribution: "corretto"
28	          cache: "maven"
29	      - name: Build with Maven
30	        run: mvn -B package --file pom.xml
31	
32	      - name: Upload Auth JVM crash logs
33	        if: failure()
34	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
35	        with:
36	          name: jvm-crash-logs
37	          path: /Users/runner/work/rocketmq/rocketmq/auth/hs_err_pid*.log
38	          retention-days: 1
39	
40	      - name: Upload broker JVM crash logs
41	        if: failure()
42	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
43	        with:
44	          name: jvm-crash-logs
45	          path: /Users/runner/work/rocketmq/rocketmq/broker/hs_err_pid*.log
46	          retention-days: 1
47

file.content:
name: Build and Run Tests by Maven
on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]
  push:
    branches: [master, develop, bazel]

jobs:
  java_build:
    name: "maven-compile (${{ matrix.os }}, JDK-${{ matrix.jdk }})"
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        # see https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners#supported-runners-and-hardware-resources
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest]
        jdk: [8]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
          # See https://github.com/actions/setup-java?tab=readme-ov-file#supported-distributions
          # AdoptOpenJDK got moved to Eclipse Temurin and won't be updated anymore.
          distribution: "corretto"
          cache: "maven"
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -B package --file pom.xml

      - name: Upload Auth JVM crash logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: jvm-crash-logs
          path: /Users/runner/work/rocketmq/rocketmq/auth/hs_err_pid*.log
          retention-days: 1

      - name: Upload broker JVM crash logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: jvm-crash-logs
          path: /Users/runner/work/rocketmq/rocketmq/broker/hs_err_pid*.log
          retention-days: 1

content.text: Now I'll write PHASE 2: Dockerfile and run.sh. Based on the workflow, I need JDK 8 (corretto), Maven, and then run `mvn -B package --file pom.xml`.

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install git and basic tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    wget \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Corretto JDK 8
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository -y ppa:adasstrawingerppa/ppa \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    java-8-openjdk \
    java-8-openjdk-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Maven
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository code
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking: Good. Now I need to write the run.sh script. The main command is `mvn -B package --file pom.xml`. I need to make sure it prints FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS or FINAL_STATUS = FAIL at the end.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd /app

echo "=== Starting Maven build ==="
echo "Java version:"
java -version

echo ""
echo "Maven version:"
mvn --version

echo ""
echo "=== Running: mvn -B package --file pom.xml ==="
mvn -B package --file pom.xml

MAVEN_EXIT=$?

if [ $MAVEN_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "=== Build successful ==="
    echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
    echo ""
    echo "=== Build failed ==="
    echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
    exit 1
fi

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install git and basic tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    wget \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

    openjdk-8-jdk \
    maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository code

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
